mmlu.description: General reasoning baseline from the lm-eval MMLU task.

sovereign_policy_qa.description: Jurisdiction policy question answering over the lab's synthetic sovereign corpus.

data_residency_qa.description: Correct answers for cross-border data transfer and residency prompts.
